page: Amazon Web Services m6idn.32xlarge is a general-purpose, network and EBS-optimized instance powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor. It features 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores utilizing the x86_64 Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 512 GB of DDR4 memory operating at 3 GHz, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes 7600 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the m6idn.32xlarge demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, placing in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Passmark CPU extended instructions tests. Single-core performance is moderate, ranking in the middle 50% for stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core tests. Memory bandwidth is strong, scoring in the top 25% for both cached and uncached read-only operations. Cryptographic and vector processing capabilities are enhanced by hardware support for AES, VAES, SHA_NI, AVX, and AVX-512.

Given its high resource density, balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, and massive local NVMe storage, this instance offers high qualitative cost efficiency for data-intensive workloads that require high-speed local disk access and high network throughput. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, high-performance web serving, multi-threaded data processing, and moderate LLM prompt processing workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services m6idn.32xlarge is a general-purpose, network-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8375C processor running at 3.5 GHz. It includes 512 GB of DDR4 memory, 7600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, the instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% on stress-ng and Passmark CPU benchmarks, alongside strong memory bandwidth. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-capacity local storage, the m6idn.32xlarge is well-suited for large-scale databases, high-throughput web serving, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring 128 Intel vCPUs, 7.6 TB local NVMe storage, and 200 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

512 GB of DDR4 memory and 7600 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
